ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( NOT($User.Bypass_Validation_Rules__c ), NOT( CONTAINS($Label.Global_Complaint_Excluded_Subsidairy, RecordType.DeveloperName)),
OR( ISPICKVAL(Type,"Complaint"), ISPICKVAL(External_Case_Type__c,"Complaint") ), ISPICKVAL( Complaint_reason__c , "Non-Conformity"), ISBLANK( ComplaintActionPlan__c ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: If the value « Non-Conformity » is picked in the field "Complaint reason", an Action Plan needs to be created
